'''Harbo Wiis''' was an unsuccessful [[Corellian/Legends|Corellian]] smuggler residing on [[Tatooine/Legends|Tatooine]]. He was once hired to bring a container of [[tirginni cologne]] to [[Crime lord/Legends|crime lord]] [[Ranon Djelkh]], but badly botched the transaction when he sold it to another buyer and had it sent to the wrong [[Hangar/Legends|docking bay]].

{{Char-stub}}
